sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]',RiskTerr,Descr from RiskTerrs)
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and m.Table_ID = 'ClaimLiabRollFwd' and m.ID = 'GL'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger,GL,Co, TP, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, Flex3) (select KeyID, Ledger,GL,Co, TP, TTY, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'pass1' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger,GL,Co, TP, TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex3 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0))
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Gross Unpaid Claim Liabilities' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL like '20%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Ceded Unpaid Claim Liabilities' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL like '14%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Gross Hedge-Futures' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL like '503%' and not (GL = '5030000' and Ledger = 'IF')
update TransX set GLdesc = (case when Amt3 >= 0 then 150 else 210 end) + GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Assgnmt) (Select y.KeyID, x.Co, y.GLdesc + substring(x.GL,4,4), x.Crcy, '877' as TTY, x.TP, x.PC, x.ProdCode, x.PTF, x.Amt1, x.Amt2, x.Amt3,x.GL from TransX x inner join TransX y on substring(x.PC,1,6) = y.PC and substring(x.GL,3,1) = y.GL and x.KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and y.KeyID = '[batchID]' where substring(x.GL,1,3) <> y.GLdesc)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC,ProdCode,PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Assgnmt) (Select KeyID, Co, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(-Amt1,2), round(-Amt2,2), round(-Amt3,2),Assgnmt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 asset-liab reclass', SubProd = 'G27' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, PC, Amt3, Flex1) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, substring(GL,3,1), substring(PC,1,6), round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' group by substring(GL,3,1),substring(PC,1,6))
update TransX set Amt3 = 1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '550000' and GL = '6'
update TransX set Amt3 = -1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '550000' and GL = '5'

delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (substring(GL,1,1) in ('5','6') or substring(GL,1,2) in ('13','14','15','18','20','21','22','23','40','41') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('282','287','441'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Ledger in (select LedgerGroup from LedgerGroups where Ledger = 'IF') and not Ledger = ''

update IR17_Trigger set Flag = 'Y', insdt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where Pipelinename = 'P_PL_IFRS_SAP_AzureSQL_Pull' and GroupID = (select Field1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'Trigger' and '[BudAct]' like Descr)
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
